eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Potter, TX; at 12:22 PM ON FEB 18, 2026 Effective until 01:22 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: MANDATORY EVACUATION NOW immediately from Valley De Oro due to fire. This order is effective until further notice. Leave now and follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Call Red Cross 1-800-733-2767 or visit social media for updates. Stay informed via local news or official channels. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly.  Call Red Cross 1-800-733-2767 for assistance. A shelter has been set up at The Church At Bushland 1800 S FM 2381, Amarillo, TX 79124.
